command: MT5='/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5' && echo '=== Profile dirs ===' && find "$MT5/config" -type d 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '=== Chart files ===' && find "$MT5/config" -name '*.chr' 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo '=== Check for EA in chart config ===' && find "$MT5/config" -name '*.chr' -exec grep -l -i 'PropFirm\|expert' {} \; 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Profiles ===' && find "$MT5" -path '*/profiles/*' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '=== Check autotrading ===' && find "$MT5" -name 'common.ini' -o -name 'terminal.ini' 2>/dev/null | while read f; do echo "--- $f ---"; grep -i 'auto\|expert\|allowed' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done && echo '=== Any .chr files anywhere ===' && find "$MT5" -name '*.chr' 2>/dev/null | head -10
